text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oof... The sun is so bright. It's making me dizzy.
choice_data_list: Are you feeling under the weather?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
No... It's just that there's a child staying at my
parents' place right now...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
They keep waking up in the middle of the night
and won't go to sleep until they talk to me for
some reason.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm getting multiple phone calls every night...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Mnnh... I feel like I might pass out on the spot...
